name: Neevcloud
notes:
If interested in hosting an NeevCloud (AS 1433) in your network, please submit a request via https://neevcloud.com/peering.html

We have a generally open peering policy but require peers to maintain an accurate peeringdb entry for all peering requests.

Please send all peering and capacity planning requests, including ASN, to noc@neevcloud.com .

DE-CIX Mumbai IPV4 & IPV6  all are up.

Send your requests to  noc@neevcloud.com .
